title: Rich and Aerated British Wensleydale Tagine
description: A hearty, flavorful tagine that showcases the richness of English Wensleydale cheese, perfect for a cozy winter evening. Simmered with a blend of Mediterranean spices, this dish is sure to become a favorite.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the tagine over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the Wensleydale cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the lemon juice and honey. Stir to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
